research.title: AI-Native Data Governance: From Policy to Platform
research.excerpt: A practitioner's guide to rebuilding data governance for the age of generative AI — covering policy automation, LLM data contracts, and federated compliance architectures.
research.author: Aniruddha Mitra

research.title: Silent Data Corruption in Multi-Stage AI Pipelines
research.excerpt: Original research on value profiling and corruption propagation in enterprise ML pipelines — with a novel detection framework validated across 3 financial services environments.
research.author: Aniruddha Mitra

research.title: The CDO Operating Model Canvas
research.excerpt: A practical framework for transforming CDO organizations from cost centers to AI-driven revenue generators — covering org design, talent, governance, and P&L accountability.
research.author: Aniruddha Mitra

blog.title: Why Your AI PoC Is Stuck at 30% Conversion (And How to Fix It)
blog.excerpt: Most enterprises can run a PoC. Very few can industrialize it. Here's the structural gap I've seen across 50+ enterprise AI programs — and the architecture that closes it.
blog.author: Aniruddha Mitra

blog.title: Dear CDO: Stop Running IT. Start Generating Revenue.
blog.excerpt: The CDO role was invented to steward data. The next generation CDO must generate revenue with it. Here's how I made that transition — and what it takes.
blog.author: Aniruddha Mitra

portfolio.title: Teradata-to-GCP Migration & AI Banking Platform
portfolio.excerpt: Led end-to-end migration from Teradata to Google Cloud, establishing an AI-native data platform for KeyBank. Deployed real-time risk models, feature store, and DFAST/CCAR automation.
portfolio.author: Aniruddha Mitra

speaking.title: From Data Cost Center to AI Growth Engine
speaking.excerpt: Keynote on how CDOs can reframe their mandate, own a P&L line, and position data as a revenue-generating asset rather than an operational cost.
speaking.author: Aniruddha Mitra
speaking.location: Google Cloud Next — Financial Services Summit
